package router

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "html/template"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_template_parse_for_unused_routes: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Lazy loading. Flag parsing templates for routes that may never be served in the current process mode.
type CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerTemplateParseForUnusedRoutesDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_lazy_loading"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    adminTpl := template.Must(template.New("admin").Parse("<h1>admin</h1>"))
    reportsTpl := template.Must(template.New("reports").Parse("<h1>reports</h1>"))
    debugTpl := template.Must(template.New("debug").Parse("<h1>debug</h1>"))
    _ = adminTpl
    _ = reportsTpl
    _ = debugTpl
    perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "lazy": 3, "loading": 4, "eager": 5, "template": 6}
    perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["parsed"] = len(input)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    lazy_positive_2 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["lazy"] + len(input)
    _ = lazy_positive_2
    loading_positive_3 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["loading"] + len(input)
    _ = loading_positive_3
    eager_positive_4 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["eager"] + len(input)
    _ = eager_positive_4
    template_positive_5 := perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_positive["template"] + len(input)
    _ = template_positive_5
    return nil
}
